author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for model fallback on repeated 529 overloaded errors (parity with CC withRetry.ts FallbackTriggeredError / query.ts:894-950). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires fallback model config, retry-state tracking across attempts (currently in forbidden-files pipeline.rs — see #686), and FallbackTriggeredError flow upward to the session loop. Parent audit #537.
